case_title: GURU SHARANM LLC VS. PETER KAUTZMANN et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, THIS CASE SETTLED AS TO DEFENANT ROSIE SULLIVAN ONLY. THE PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED AGREEMENT, WHICH WAS NOT FILED. OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Guru Sharanm LLC is present. Represented by Nazir Hamid
Attorney Arnold W. Evje II appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rosie Sullivan is present. Defendant Pete Kautzmann is not present.
Attorney John Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled as to defenant Rosie Sullivan only. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by the second defendant Pete Kautzmann. The trial date of APR-30-2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
